title: Articles — Quick Reference (Isabella)
kicker: One page · how an article reaches *your* vault, on each device
subtitle: The companion to your **[explainer](https://isottam.github.io/docs/articles-quick-reference-isabella-explainer/)** — this card is *what to tap*; the explainer is *why*. Publishers fall into three groups: **fetch-directly** (FT · Telegraph · Substack · web), **bot-blocked** (NYT · Bloomberg · The Times · WSJ — only a *real logged-in browser* gets past their defences), and **closed** (Apple News). Only the **bot-blocked** group depends on a choice — **Setup 1**, you share the household's logins (lower risk, the default), or **Setup 2**, you keep your own logins (more seamless, but risks "too many devices" lockouts). Both tables below; everything else is identical either way.
